summary: Final synthesis confirms C+F survives only with workflow invariance: levels stay public and AI-facing; preset/capability/kind stay private.
impact: Locks final recommendation language without adding a new design direction.

summary: ADR-005 narrows ADR-001/ADR-004 by banning private taxonomy leaks from CLI help, command docs, skill text, validator output, generated markers, and AI-readable metadata.
impact: Gives implementation reviewers a concrete public/private boundary.

summary: Workflow-invariance CI should be one test under scripts/tests/ with live-surface scans plus allowlisted public-doc scans.
impact: Prevents split-test drift while enforcing the invariant in one regression gate.
